_comment: Conceptual Model Context Protocol (MCP) server schema for the Identity SOAR agent used by a Microsoft Security Copilot custom agent. Read tools are auto-executable; the single state-changing tool ONLY proposes an approval-gated plan and never mutates state. No secrets or tokens appear here; the server authenticates to Azure via managed identity / OIDC at runtime.

server.name: identity-soar-mcp
server.description: Grounds a Security Copilot agent in Microsoft Sentinel, Microsoft Entra ID Protection, and this repo's detection context for identity-attack triage. Read-only by default; containment is proposal-only and human-approved.

auth.note: Server runs as an Azure managed identity / federated workload identity. No client secrets are stored. Least-privilege RBAC: Microsoft Sentinel Reader + Security Reader for read tools; the propose tool holds NO write role.

tools.name: get_signin_timeline
tools.description: Return the sign-in timeline for an identity over a window, including MFA results, result types, risk level, IP and geo. Read-only.

tools.name: get_unified_identity_risk_score
tools.description: Return the unified identity risk score and contributing risk detections for a user from Microsoft Entra ID Protection (riskLevel, riskState, riskDetections) fused with Sentinel UEBA (InvestigationPriority). Read-only.

tools.name: get_correlated_incident_graph
tools.description: Return the graph-correlated blast radius for an alert: connected entities and the attack path (identity -> service principal -> resource -> exposure) via graph relationships, not time-window joins. Read-only.

seedEntity.description: UPN, service principal id, or resource id

tools.name: check_mfa_fatigue_pattern
tools.description: Evaluate whether a user's recent sign-ins match the MFA fatigue signature (>=5 denied/timed-out strong-auth prompts in 10 minutes, optionally followed by an approval). Read-only.

tools.name: propose_containment_action
tools.description: PROPOSE (do not execute) a containment plan for an incident. Returns an ordered, least-destructive-first plan with each action's automation class (automatic / approval-required) and a rollback note. This tool NEVER mutates state; execution requires a human approval that runs a separate, audited Logic App playbook.

resources.name: Detection catalogue
resources.description: The repo's detection catalogue (DET-001..007, CP-DET-001..008, DET-CICD-001) with MITRE mappings, thresholds and tuning notes - grounds the agent so it reasons about real rules.

resources.name: SOAR automation matrix
resources.description: Which response actions are automatic vs approval-required, keyed by blast radius / reversibility / confidence.

resources.name: Responsible AI boundaries
resources.description: The agent's operating constraints: advisory-only, human-in-the-loop for state changes, minimised context, untrusted-telemetry handling.

guardrails.human_in_the_loop: No tool executes a state-changing action. propose_containment_action returns a plan; a human approves and a separate audited playbook acts.
guardrails.data_minimisation: Tools return aggregates and typed entities, not raw log bodies; no secrets or tokens are ever returned.
guardrails.untrusted_input: Telemetry-derived strings are treated as data, never instructions (prompt-injection defence).
guardrails.auditability: Every tool call and every proposed plan is logged for review.
